### Testing
<!-- How was this rule validated? -->
- [ ] Tested against real log samples
- [ ] Tested with Muninn (`muninn -e ... -r rule.yml --stats`)
- [ ] Verified YAML syntax
- [ ] Checked for duplicate rules

### Checklist
- [ ] Rule has a unique UUID
- [ ] MITRE ATT&CK tags present
- [ ] Accurate logsource (product/category/service)
- [ ] False positives documented
- [ ] References provided
- [ ] File name follows convention
- [ ] Placed in correct directory
